final_answer: Hi, I'm Sofia Li. I live in San Antonio, 78260. I recently received a digital camera and I'd like to return it and get a full refund back to my original payment method. I believe my order number might be #W8855135, but I'm not completely sure — could you look it up by my name or zip code if that number doesn't match? I do want to insist on processing this return and getting my refund to the original payment method used for the purchase. Please let me know what steps I need to take to send the camera back.
